name: Policy Re-Framing Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Redefines digital sovereignty as a resilience imperative → Systemic: Increases pressure on Digitaliseringsstyrelsen to adopt supplier-neutral procurement policies (estimated 15-20% shift in procurement criteria by 2029) → Strategic: Establishes resilience as a core governance metric for public-sector digital systems. Controls short-term operational continuity vs. long-term structural change. Weakness: The options fail to consider potential legal challenges from platform vendors.

name: Technical Demonstration Strategy
